codeReview.summary: The Beta posterior tracking implementation is correct and fully covers the feature requirements. All 57 tests pass including 11 new tests specifically for the Beta posterior behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission directory at the specified path does not exist, and handoffs/worker-transcripts files are not available. Review is based solely on code diff and tests.

summary: PASS - The mem-procedural-beta feature is correctly implemented. BetaPosterior correctly tracks α (successes+1) and β (failures+1). On success, α increments; on failure, β increments. Mean confidence is computed as α/(α+β). Procedures with confidence < 0.3 are excluded from retrieval (Deprecated). All 57 tests pass and clippy reports no warnings.
